'''鈭歯g-w-th-th''' ('''kangawthethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cuckoo|cuckoo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cuckoo|cuckoo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-w-th-th
|-
! Lemma
| kangawthethoko
|}
